KATELYN C. THOMPSON
Public Policy · Strategic Communications

Turning ideas into action.

A Tennessee policy and communications leader who turns complex challenges into people centered solutions.

About

A Memphis native shaping Tennessee's civic landscape.

Katelyn pairs strategic acumen with compassionate leadership and a relentless commitment to equity. A Tennessee State University alum, she holds dual degrees in criminal justice and psychology and a Master of Public Administration, credentials she uses to translate policy into tangible benefits for all Tennesseans.

Selected Work

Ideas turned into meaningful action.

STATE GOVERNMENT

Policy Director, TN Senate Democratic Caucus

Directs legislative strategy and advances equitable policy across a broad coalition of stakeholders.

MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENT

Executive Communications, Mayor Paul A. Young

Shapes strategic messaging, public communications, and community engagement for the City of Memphis.

CAMPAIGNS

Campaign Manager, Sen. London Lamar

Helped elect the youngest woman and African American to the Tennessee Senate.
